ApplyOverrides.description: Sparse user-authored overrides for the `apply` section.

save_folder.description: Output folder for saved predictions or evaluation artifacts. Use 'default' for apply to save next to the inputs, or null for evaluate to save inside the model run directory.
save_folder.title: Save Folder

in_place.description: Whether apply outputs should be written back into the input location.
in_place.title: In Place

epoch_number.description: Explicit checkpoint epoch number to load. Use null to select the checkpoint through best_or_last instead.
epoch_number.title: Epoch Number

best_or_last.description: Checkpoint selector used when epoch_number is null. Supported values are 'best', 'last', and 'both'.
best_or_last.title: Best Or Last

filters.description: File extensions accepted when apply input points to a directory.
filters.title: Filters

skip_if_contain.description: Optional substrings; matching filenames are skipped during apply.
skip_if_contain.title: Skip If Contain

crop_size.description: Optional center crop used before inference. Use a single integer for a square crop or a height,width tuple.
crop_size.title: Crop Size

keep_original_shape.description: Whether outputs should be padded back to the original spatial size after cropped inference.
keep_original_shape.title: Keep Original Shape

tiling_size.description: Tile size used for patch-wise inference. Use null to fall back to the model/runtime default.
tiling_size.title: Tiling Size

stack_selection_idx.description: Optional stack or channel index selected before converting the input to a 4D tensor.
stack_selection_idx.title: Stack Selection Idx

timelapse_max.description: Optional maximum number of timelapse frames to process during apply.
timelapse_max.title: Timelapse Max

lvae_num_samples.description: Number of stochastic samples drawn when running LVAE models.
lvae_num_samples.title: Lvae Num Samples

lvae_save_samples.description: Whether individual LVAE samples should be saved in addition to the main prediction.
lvae_save_samples.title: Lvae Save Samples

denormalize_output.description: Whether model outputs should be converted back from normalized model space before saving.
denormalize_output.title: Denormalize Output

save_inp.description: Whether the input image or tensor should also be saved alongside predictions.
save_inp.title: Save Inp

downsamp.description: Optional spatial downsampling factor applied to the apply input before inference.
downsamp.title: Downsamp

fill_factor.description: Optional fill factor used with deterministic 'multiple' apply downsampling. When set, apply uses generate_downsamp_inp with random=false.
fill_factor.title: Fill Factor

apply_color_code.description: Whether an additional color-coded visualization should be saved for volumetric apply outputs.
apply_color_code.title: Apply Color Code

color_code_prm.description: Nested volumetric color-coding overrides used when apply_color_code is true.

dark_frame_context_length.description: Whether missing timelapse context frames should be replaced with dark frames instead of skipping sequence edges.
dark_frame_context_length.title: Dark Frame Context Length

ApplyOverrides.title: ApplyOverrides

ColorCodeOverrides.description: Sparse user overrides for volumetric color-coding settings.

colormap.description: Matplotlib colormap name used for volumetric color-coding.
colormap.title: Colormap

saturation.description: Contrast boost applied to the color-coded volumetric visualization.
saturation.title: Saturation

add_colorbar.description: Whether a colorbar should be appended to the color-coded volumetric visualization.
add_colorbar.title: Add Colorbar

zstep.description: Physical or logical spacing between z slices used when scaling the volumetric colorbar.
zstep.title: Zstep

ColorCodeOverrides.title: ColorCodeOverrides

EvaluateOverrides.description: Sparse user-authored overrides for the `evaluate` section.

best_or_last.description: Checkpoint selector used when epoch_number is null. Supported values are 'best', 'last', and 'both'.
best_or_last.title: Best Or Last

epoch_number.description: Explicit checkpoint epoch number to load. Use null to select the checkpoint through best_or_last instead.
epoch_number.title: Epoch Number

tiling_size.description: Tile size used for patch-wise inference. Use null to fall back to the model/runtime default.
tiling_size.title: Tiling Size

crop_size.description: Optional center crop used before inference. Use a single integer for a square crop or a height,width tuple.
crop_size.title: Crop Size

metrics_list.description: Metrics to compute during evaluation, for example ['psnr', 'ssim']. Use null to skip metrics.
metrics_list.title: Metrics List

lvae_num_samples.description: Number of stochastic samples drawn when running LVAE models.
lvae_num_samples.title: Lvae Num Samples

save_folder.description: Output folder for saved predictions or evaluation artifacts. Use 'default' for apply to save next to the inputs, or null for evaluate to save inside the model run directory.
save_folder.title: Save Folder

overwrite.description: Whether an existing save folder may be overwritten.
overwrite.title: Overwrite

eval_gt.description: Optional ground-truth override path used when evaluating against a custom target location.
eval_gt.title: Eval Gt

data_prm_update.description: Optional extra data-loader overrides such as {'data_dir': '...'} or {'subfolder': '...'} used during evaluation.
data_prm_update.title: Data Prm Update

ch_out.description: Output channel count forwarded to inference. Defaults to 1 for evaluation because models are trained to predict a single target frame even when inputs contain multiple context channels.
ch_out.title: Ch Out

split.description: Dataset split to evaluate, typically 'test' or 'val'.
split.title: Split

limit_n_imgs.description: Optional cap on the number of images or batches evaluated.
limit_n_imgs.title: Limit N Imgs

EvaluateOverrides.title: EvaluateOverrides

description:
Sparse user-authored inference YAML overrides.

Any omitted section or field means "leave the resolved default as-is".
This is the model used to validate files under `configs/inference/*.yml`.

apply.description: Optional overrides for the `lisai apply` flow.

evaluate.description: Optional overrides for the `lisai evaluate` flow.

title: InferenceOverrides
